items.title: Carrick slams 'shocking' Martinez red card in loss
items.summary: Michael Carrick has labeled the decision to send off Lisandro Martinez in Manchester United's shock 1-2 defeat by Leeds United on Monday night as one of the worst he's ever seen.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
